<@341970778650181643> so this is how Ezio works
- He replaces Moxie with Synchronization. 
- There are 3 ways to increase Syn: basic incan triggers [Assassination] or Counter the enemies with [Eye Caught] or killing enemies
since Kassandra's debuff inflicts [Lethal Injury], her teammates can attack said enemies with that debuff and triggers Assassination -> Ezio's Syn is up -> More Syn, More Ult
